title: juniperus sabina var. prostrata
intro: Juniperus sabina var. prostrata, also known as Savin Juniper or Creeping Juniper, is a low-growing, spreading shrub native to mountainous regions in Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of terpenes and volatile oils. The health benefits of Juniperus sabina var. prostrata include relief from digestive issues, kidney stones, and urinary tract infections, as well as its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of Juniperus sabina var. prostrata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves, bark, or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol or glycerin.
